Tana Review

Structured note-taking app with graph database under the hood

PricingFree / $15/mo Pro / $30/mo Team
Rating★★★★ 4.2/5
Best forpower users, researchers, consultants

Pros & Cons

👍 Pros

  • Powerful structured data
  • Super-tags
  • Daily notes

👎 Cons

  • Steep learning curve
  • No mobile app yet
  • Expensive

Key Features

  • Super-tags
  • Nodes
  • Daily notes
  • Graph view

Best Use Cases

  • Knowledge management
  • Project management
  • Personal CRM

Compare with Alternatives

See how Tana stacks up against: NotionObsidianSliteReadwise
